feature.name: Workflows Template Management And Chat Entry

approval.specReviewApprovalSource: User invoked $sp-plan after user-review-requested spec handoff on 2026-05-26.
approval.assumption: The $sp-plan invocation is treated as approval to proceed from spec review to design planning.

adaptiveDispatch.degradationReason: Native subagent tool policy permits spawning only when the user explicitly asks for sub-agents, delegation, or parallel agent work.

intent.summary: Add a unified Workflows surface for Settings template management and Chat workflow start.

allowedOptimizationScope: extract workflow template API from sessions API for maintainability
extract shared workflow session creation service
reuse existing workflow UI components and shared controls
add additive client/API response fields only

querySummary.coverage: path-level minimal live reads; no relationship graph nodes returned
querySummary.followUp: Artifact-only planning does not mark cognition dirty. After source/runtime route/service changes, run $sp-map-update for changed paths.

invariants: source normal chat is not converted in place
source transcript is not compacted or cleared
target workflow session receives template snapshot
active streaming source sessions are rejected or disabled

consequenceObligations.claim: Built-in templates remain startable when user workflow config is missing, malformed, or contains invalid templates.
consequenceObligations.stopAndReopen: Invalid user config blocks built-in template listing or start.

consequenceObligations.claim: All write paths preserve unknown fields in cc-jiangxia-owned workflows.json.
consequenceObligations.stopAndReopen: Write behavior becomes lossy or touches protected files.

consequenceObligations.claim: Built-ins are protected and user templates cannot shadow built-in ids.
consequenceObligations.stopAndReopen: UI/API permits built-in edit/delete or saving agent-development as user template.

consequenceObligations.claim: Existing workflow session snapshots are not mutated by source template edits.
consequenceObligations.stopAndReopen: Implementation scans or rewrites existing workflow session state after template changes.

consequenceObligations.claim: Non-empty normal chats require context strategy and linked-session behavior.
consequenceObligations.stopAndReopen: Workflow starts from non-empty chat without explicit strategy or mutates source chat.

consequenceObligations.claim: Custom workflow authoring preserves phase output artifacts and handoff contracts as first-class schema.

conditionalChecks.condition: persistence shape changes beyond additive workflows.json fields
summarize strategy depends on live provider availability
conditionalChecks.command: bun run quality:providers then live baseline when credentials are available

testAreas: src/server/__tests__/sessions.test.ts or focused workflow API tests
desktop/src/pages/Settings.test.tsx or focused Workflows settings tests

risks.summary: Non-mutating compact-style summary may require careful extraction from command-oriented compaction code.
risks.mitigation: Implement a fork/preview summary helper; stop if only mutating /compact is available.

risks.summary: Schema-aware editor could become too broad.
risks.mitigation: Common fields first, advanced disclosure, optional raw JSON only as secondary validation aid.
Centralize writes through registry service and add old-fixture regression tests.

handoff.checklistReason: Requirements were self-reviewed and no hard planning unknowns remain; use $sp-checklist only if the user wants an additional requirements-quality audit.
